---
title: "A Case Study of Employing Deep Learning to Predict Parkinson's Disease with Microbiome Data"
author:
    - name: Longhai Li
      url: https://longhaisk.github.io
date: last-modified
execute: 
  cache: false
  freeze: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  clearresults: FALSE
  seed: 400
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
    number-sections: true
    cache: false
    freeze: false
  typst: 
    echo: false
    cache: false
    freeze: false
    fig-format: pdf
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---
